dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/4 agents responded: Elanor Brightloom, Narvi Irondeep, Míriel Goldthread. Orion Solarin did NOT respond — 3rd consecutive miss. 75% response rate. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 3 responders used correct names, followed 3-point format perfectly. No identity confusion. All reported idle/awaiting assignment status — consistent and accurate.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Elanor: 3.05s, Narvi: 3.49s, Míriel: 3.49s. Avg: 3.34s. Improved from 3.79s last run. -1 for minor spread.

improvements: Sent escalated direct callout to Orion Solarin in group chat about 3rd consecutive missed response, requesting a simple confirmation reply. Previous run flagged Orion as needing admin check — this run escalates the callout tone.
issues: Orion Solarin missed response for 3rd consecutive run (runs #11, #12, #13). Was active in runs #8-10 but has been unresponsive since. Likely a webhook/connectivity issue on Orion's agent — needs Fluffle admin investigation. API endpoint to check agent status returned 'unauthorized' so cannot diagnose further from this side.
